title: hieracium triangulare subsp. eudaedalium
intro: Hieracium triangulare subsp. eudaedalium, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds and promote healing. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system. Hawkweed can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
